0.text: Collapsed trachea and lobar and segmental bronchi

1.text: Near-complete atelectasis of the lower lobe of the left lung

2.text: Consolidation in the upper lobe of the right lung

3.text: Ground-glass opacities in the upper lobe of the right lung

4.text: Mild interlobular septal thickening in the basal segment of the lower lobe of the right lung
